query:
SELECT g.nome, c.codigo, c.usado, c.createdAt
FROM codigosAcessoGestante c
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = c.gestanteId
WHERE g.nome LIKE '%Juliana%Tavares%'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT g.nome, c.codigo, c.usado, c.createdAt
FROM codigosAcessoGestante c
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = c.gestanteId
WHERE g.nome LIKE '%Juliana%Tavares%'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
